summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Bangladesh should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence, including a test summary made available through the transport chain. The report and summary must match the shipped design type, model, chemistry, capacity, protection design, module configuration, and change-control history.
summary.zh: 运往孟加拉国的锂电芯和电池应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分38.3小节证据，并在运输链中提供测试概要。报告和概要必须匹配所运输的设计类型、型号、化学体系、容量、保护设计、模组配置和变更控制历史。
summary.zht: 運往孟加拉國的鋰電芯和電池應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分38.3小節證據，並在運輸鏈中提供測試概要。報告和概要必須匹配所運輸的設計類型、型號、化學體系、容量、保護設計、模組配置和變更控制歷史。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
UN 38.3 test-summary availability through the transport chain

summary.en: China GB battery-safety reports under GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023 are product-safety evidence, not dangerous-goods transport evidence. Export logistics files should reconcile China design-change records with the tested UN 38.3 design and the Bangladesh-bound shipment.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023项下的中国GB电池安全报告是产品安全证据，不是危险货物运输证据。出口物流资料应将中国设计变更记录、UN 38.3已测设计和实际运往孟加拉国的货批相互核对。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023項下的中國GB電池安全報告是產品安全證據，不是危險貨物運輸證據。出口物流資料應將中國設計變更記錄、UN 38.3已測設計和實際運往孟加拉國的貨批相互核對。

gap.en: Before booking, verify the UN 38.3 report, test summary, manufacturer and model identity, design revision, SDS, classification, packing instruction, emergency information, and carrier or port requirements for the actual route.
gap.zh: 订舱前应核查UN 38.3报告、测试概要、制造商和型号一致性、设计版本、SDS、分类、包装指令、应急信息以及实际路线的承运人或港口要求。
gap.zht: 訂艙前應核查UN 38.3報告、測試概要、製造商和型號一致性、設計版本、SDS、分類、包裝指令、應急資訊以及實際路線的承運人或港口要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where UN model rules and modal air, sea, road, port, carrier, customs, or freight-forwarder practice apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for China export transport acceptance where lithium batteries are offered for transport under dangerous-goods rules

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh project or market-access evidence and China GB battery reports do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence for lithium batteries.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国项目或市场准入证据以及中国GB电池报告不能替代锂电池UN 38.3运输证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國項目或市場准入證據以及中國GB電池報告不能替代鋰電池UN 38.3運輸證據。
